selections.name: Blazing Statement
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 to utilize early speed on this tight track. Strong heavy track form profiles nicely here.

selections.name: Battle Scars
selections.reason: Settled back but ran on strongly on rain-affected going last start. Capable of a much better performance today.

selections.name: Milchel
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Trialed well on a soft track and gets blinkers on for the first time.

selections.name: Zenmode
selections.reason: Unexposed 2yo gelding open to plenty of improvement after a fair debut on a wet track at Newcastle.

danger_horse.name: Heeza Steve
danger_horse.reason: Well held last start but has tactical versatility and should be competitive in this field.

selections.name: Ateba
selections.reason: High-priced yearling who has trialed exceptionally well for an elite stable. Drawn the rail which is a massive advantage at Gosford.

selections.name: Avalon
selections.reason: Ran a solid fourth on debut at Hawkesbury on a slow track. Will find this field vastly inferior.

selections.name: Absolutist
selections.reason: First starter who showed excellent speed to win her only trial at Wyong. Can make an immediate impact.

selections.name: Bascilica Babe
selections.reason: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Trialed very sharply at Wyong and has shown metropolitan-level class.

danger_horse.name: Arrest Warrant
danger_horse.reason: Second-up. Fitter for a recent run at Wyong and has room for improvement.

selections.name: Lady Of The Castle
selections.reason: Fitter for an excellent first-up third on a heavy track at Newcastle. Hard to beat from barrier 3.

selections.name: Acharnee
selections.reason: Resuming for a top stable. Trialed very well but the wide barrier is a significant negative at this track.

selections.name: Caddy's Steps
selections.reason: First starter who has trialed well enough at Randwick to suggest competitiveness in this provincial grade.

selections.name: Love Goddess
selections.reason: Fitter for a first-up run at Wyong. Capable of showing tactical speed.

danger_horse.name: Bobby
danger_horse.reason: Disappointed last start but has some wet track credentials from earlier in his career.

selections.name: Squeezebox
selections.reason: In superb form with consecutive runner-up finishes at Hawkesbury. Handles wet tracks and is very hard to beat.

selections.name: Kirkuk
selections.reason: Very fit and comes out of a strong metropolitan race at Randwick. Drawn to get a perfect run.

selections.name: Dollars
selections.reason: Third-up today and has a strong wet-track profile. Lee Magorrian takes the ride.

selections.name: Tillstrom
selections.reason: Fitter for a first-up run at Moruya. Drawn the rail and has the early speed to lead.

danger_horse.name: Kahraba
danger_horse.reason: Ran a bold third first-up at Muswellbrook. Fitter now and handles rain-affected going.

selections.name: Melanite
selections.reason: Class horse of the race who ran a superb third first-up at Hawkesbury. Handles the wet and is poised to strike.

selections.name: Difensivo
selections.reason: Excellent second on a heavy track at this course last start. Drawn wide but has the early speed to cross.

selections.name: Aeternum
selections.reason: Speedy type who will appreciate the tight turns. Ran a bold second at Wyong last start.

selections.name: Cosmic Order
selections.reason: Won her maiden in good style two starts back. Drawn perfectly to box seat.

danger_horse.name: Vittozzi
danger_horse.reason: Disappointed first-up but has excellent second-up form and is a winner on heavy ground.

selections.name: Johnny
selections.reason: Resuming but has an elite wet-track record (3: 1-2-0). Class performer who has trialed strongly.

selections.name: Cobra Club
selections.reason: Gai Waterhouse & Adrian Bott trained runner who has excellent early speed. Will lead and prove hard to catch.

selections.name: Stability
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start at Wyong on a soft track. Rapidly improving type.

selections.name: October Star
selections.reason: Drawn the inside alley. Ran a bold third at Wyong last start and handles the wet.

danger_horse.name: Whispering Rupert
danger_horse.reason: Struggled last start but has previously won at this track and distance on a heavy surface.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1, 2; Trifecta 1, 2 / 1, 2, 3, 4 / ALL

selections.name: Celestial Deal
selections.reason: Highly impressive debut winner at Scone on a slow track. Highly progressive and handles wet ground.

selections.name: Gaelic Gem
selections.reason: Consistent performer on wet tracks. Ran a bold third at this track on a heavy surface last start.

selections.name: Fire 'N' Stone
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Trialed very sharply at Scone and has the class to feature.

selections.name: Kwirky Smile
selections.reason: Talented filly from a top stable. Fitter for a first-up run at Hawkesbury and can improve.

danger_horse.name: Tennessee Dolly
danger_horse.reason: Disappointed last start but has a prior win on a wet track and can bounce back.
